jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Naukri.com
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Naukri.com in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Naukri.com:
Naukri.com is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri.com!
